    Show / Hide Table of Contents

    Interface IPrimitiveReader<TMaterial>

    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.GLB.Geometry
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    public interface IPrimitiveReader<TMaterial>
    Type Parameters
    TMaterial

    Properties

    Name Description
    Lines

    Gets the indices of all lines.
    Material

    Gets the current TMaterial instance used by this primitive.
    MorphTargets

    Gets the list of IPrimitiveMorphTargetReader.
    Points

    Gets the indices of all points.
    Surfaces

    Gets the indices of all the surfaces.
    Triangles

    Gets the indices of all the surfaces as triangles.
    VertexType

    Gets a generic type of VertexBuilder<TvG, TvM, TvS>.
    Vertices

    Gets the list of IVertexBuilder vertices.
    VerticesPerPrimitive

    Gets the number of vertices used by each primitive shape. Valid values: 1- Points. 2- Lines. 3- Triangles.

    Methods

    Name Description
    GetIndices()

    Calculates the raw list of indices to use for this primitive.
